title: crataegus pruinosa var. rugosa
intro: Crataegus pruinosa var. rugosa, also known as rugose hawthorn, is a variety of the crataegus pruinosa plant, a species of hawthorn tree native to North America. The medicinal properties of Crataegus pruinosa var. rugosa lie in its ability to support cardiovascular health due to its high levels of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins, which help to dilate blood vessels and improve blood flow. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, lowering blood pressure, and improving symptoms of angina and arrhythmia. Crataegus pruinosa var. rugosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, making it a popular herbal supplement for those seeking to support their heart health.
